birthdayCampaignManagement.title: Birthday Campaign
birthdayCampaignManagement.subtitle: Configure the artwork, caption and automatic birthday WhatsApp send time.
birthdayCampaignManagement.defaultMessage:
{Nome},

Today we celebrate your life! 🎂

May Christ reveal Himself even more clearly in every area of your life in this new season — in your paths, decisions and dreams.

May you experience a time of growth, intimacy with God and direction in every step. May grace sustain you, love surround you and His purpose lead you every day. 🙏✨

Happy birthday! You are an important part of what God is doing! 💛

Kingdom Team

validation.imageRequired: Upload the campaign image before saving.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: The job runs in the background, looks for today's birthdays with WhatsApp filled in and sends the image with the configured caption at the defined time. Each person receives it at most once per year.

result.description: The tenant was created with an admin profile and initial user ready for onboarding.

review.description: When you continue, the system will create the church, default admin profile, admin person, and initial user in a single flow.

edit.title: Edit tenant

metrics.localSummary: Summary still calculated locally for this record

items.adminAccess: Validate the provisioned initial admin access.

safeActions.title: Safe actions

safeActions.deactivateDescription: Tenant "{{name}}" will be unavailable for operation until it is reactivated.
safeActions.hint: Sensitive operations require explicit context. Use this block to avoid indirect actions from the list.
